generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system for adaptive lighting automation within the LEED Platinum academic building's Living Lab"
]

instance HVACControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system for HVAC unit management with real-time temperature and occupancy-based adjustments"
]

instance OccupancyActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for dynamic occupancy-based control of building systems in response to DT-generated signals"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor network component detecting real-time occupancy levels in building zones"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor network capturing indoor temperature parameters across building zones"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy monitoring sensor tracking real-time power consumption metrics for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorAirQualitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Air quality monitoring sensor measuring CO₂ levels and ventilation requirements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting sensor measuring ambient light levels for adaptive lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingLevelDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data transmission components
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance AirQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorAirQualitySensor
]

instance LightingLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingLevelSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Static BIM model enriched with device metadata (sensor/actuator IDs, control logic) for Digital Twin integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance RuntimeBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime model derived from BIM through model-to-model transformations for real-time operations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D interactive visualization model generated in Unreal Engine for immersive DT monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model combining BIM data with real-time sensor feedback for life-cycle optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control logic model defined by Building Control Engineers for automated commissioning"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance DataStorageModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Service-oriented data storage architecture for DT components with standardized interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance AdaptiveLightingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Specialized model for adaptive lighting control using reinforcement learning (BOREALIS project)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BOREALISReinforcementLearning
]

instance EnergyOptimizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for predictive energy optimization using BIM and sensor data for LEED compliance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance OccupancyOptimizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for occupancy-based system optimization integrating real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework automating transformations from BIM to runtime artifacts"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware enabling real-time bidirectional IoT communication (MQTT) between physical devices and DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto facilitating data synchronization and service orchestration for DT components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
    DTDFVocab:enables FacilityManagementService
]

instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine platform providing rich interactive 3D visualization for DT monitoring and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance Revit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized BIM tool (Revit) for device modeling and control logic definition in the AECO domain"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlLogicModel
]

instance BOREALISReinforcementLearning : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Specialized reinforcement learning framework for adaptive lighting control (BOREALIS project)"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingModel
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service providing immersive visualization of building operations via Unreal Engine"
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service enabling predictive analytics for life-cycle optimization using BIM and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictivePerformanceInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated commissioning service for building control systems (lighting, BCS) via middleware"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemAutomationAction
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Custom service integration for domain-specific analytics (e.g., adaptive lighting via reinforcement learning)"
    DTDFVocab:provides DomainSpecificOptimizationInsight
]

instance FacilityManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Facility management service providing interactive visualization and control for stakeholders"
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicControlAction
]

instance EnergyManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy management service for real-time adjustments to building systems based on predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ImmersiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time immersive visualization of building operations through Unreal Engine for stakeholder monitoring"
]

instance PredictivePerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics results showing building performance metrics (energy efficiency, occupant comfort) across life cycle stages"
]

instance SystemAutomationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control signals generated by DT for commissioning building systems (lighting, HVAC) via middleware"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DomainSpecificOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Specialized insights from domain-specific analytics (e.g., adaptive lighting optimization via reinforcement learning)"
]

instance DynamicControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time control adjustments made by Facility Managers via interactive DT visualization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimization actions taken by DT to adjust building systems for energy efficiency based on predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveLightingOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting control adjustments implemented via reinforcement learning (BOREALIS project)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LightingControlSystem,
                   HVACControlSystem,
                   OccupancyActuator,
                   OccupancySensor,
                   TemperatureSensor,
                   EnergyConsumptionSensor,
                   IndoorAirQualitySensor,
                   LightingLevelSensor,
                   BIMEnrichedModel,
                   SimulationModel,
                   ControlLogicModel,
                   DataStorageModel,
                   RealTimeMonitoringService,
                   AutomatedCommissioningService,
                   CustomAnalyticsService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates control outputs (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC settings) via standardized extension points in the modular architecture. These signals are transmitted back to physical actuators through the same **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** middleware, enabling closed-loop control. The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, allowing adjustments without full redeployment to maintain adaptability."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time to near-real-time** time scale, with synchronization rates determined by sensor data acquisition frequencies (e.g., 1–10 Hz for critical systems like HVAC or lighting). The framework ensures **low-latency data exchange** via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, enabling live synchronization between the physical and virtual domains. For critical applications (e.g., emergency response), ultra-low latency (<100 ms) is targeted, while non-critical services (e.g., energy optimization) may use adaptive sampling rates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with:
  - A **central DT framework** as the core hub, integrating BIM models, middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto), and visualization (Unreal Engine).
  - **Modular extension points** for custom services (e.g., analytics, control logic) developed by **DT Engineers**, enabling scalability.
  - **Hierarchical twins** for granular control (e.g., room-level vs. system-level DTs), supported by middleware for inter-twin communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the following life-cycle stages:
  1. **Design phase**: Enriched BIM models include device configurations and control logic (e.g., lighting automation) defined by **Building Control Engineers**.
  2. **Construction phase**: BIM models are validated and transformed into runtime artifacts (e.g., middleware configurations) for deployment.
  3. **Operation phase**: Real-time synchronization occurs via sensor data and control signals, enabling adaptive management (e.g., energy optimization via **BOREALIS** reinforcement learning).
  4. **Refurbishment phase**: DTs evolve with updated models and services, supported by modular architecture and runtime configuration management."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  1. **Model-driven transformations**: Automated extraction of BIM semantics to generate accurate runtime interfaces (e.g., sensor/actuator mappings).
  2. **Real-time synchronization**: Low-latency data exchange (sub-second) via Eclipse Hono/Ditto to minimize drift between physical and virtual models.
  3. **Validation metrics**: The **ODTE (Overall Digital Twin Entanglement)** metric quantifies interoperability and architectural soundness of the DT.
  4. **Uncertainty management**: Runtime data validation and error handling (e.g., sensor failures) via middleware protocols."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections are established via:
  1. **Network protocols**: **MQTT (Eclipse Hono)** for real-time IoT communication, ensuring low-latency data transfer.
  2. **Middleware**: **Eclipse Ditto** for service orchestration and **Eclipse Hono** for bidirectional data exchange.
  3. **BIM-to-runtime interfaces**: Model-driven transformations generate standardized endpoints (e.g., device IDs, endpoint addresses) for seamless integration with physical systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed via a **hybrid hosting model**: (1) **Edge deployment** for low-latency processing (e.g., sensor data filtering); (2) **Cloud hosting** for centralized services (e.g., analytics, visualization in Unreal Engine); and (3) **On-premise servers** for BIM model management and runtime interfaces. The framework leverages **standardized extension points** to integrate third-party services (e.g., IoT platforms, AI models) without redeployment."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration occurs via:
  1. **Standardized extension points**: Modular architecture allows integration with external systems (e.g., IoT platforms, analytics tools) via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto).
  2. **BIM interoperability**: Unified semantic foundation (BIM) enables communication with other AECO tools (e.g., Revit, Bentley systems).
  3. **Service orchestration**: Eclipse Ditto facilitates interoperability with third-party DTs or operational systems (e.g., building management systems)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is **shared between the PT owner and DT service providers**: (1) **Physical building data** (e.g., sensor logs, control commands) is owned by the building operator; (2) **Processed analytics** (e.g., energy optimization recommendations) may be shared with DT engineers for service evolution. Privacy is ensured via **TLS encryption**, **access controls** (e.g., role-based permissions), and **anonymization** of sensitive data (e.g., occupancy patterns). Compliance with **AECO regulations** (e.g., GDPR for data protection) is enforced via the framework’s extension points."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to **AECO-specific standards**: (1) **BIM standards** (e.g., IFC, COBie) for model exchange; (2) **MQTT/HTTP protocols** for real-time communication (Eclipse Hono/Ditto); (3) **Open standards for IoT** (e.g., OpenAPI for APIs); and (4) **Model-driven engineering (MDE) practices** (e.g., model-to-model transformations). The framework supports **interoperability** via standardized extension points for plugging in third-party services (e.g., AI models, visualization tools)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security is implemented via: (1) **Encryption** (TLS for data in transit, AES for data at rest); (2) **Authentication** (OAuth 2.0 for user access); (3) **Access controls** (role-based permissions for Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, DT Engineers); and (4) **Fault tolerance** (redundant data streams, rollback mechanisms for failed services). Safety is ensured by: (1) **Human-in-the-loop validation** (e.g., Facility Managers approve critical control actions); (2) **Emergency protocols** (e.g., fail-safe modes for actuators); and (3) **Compliance checks** (e.g., adherence to AECO safety regulations). Remote operations are restricted to authorized personnel to prevent accidents."
]
